requirement_topic.en: SKELEC / NEVLEC Grid Connection — 230 / 400 V, 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: SKELEC / NEVLEC并网接入——230 / 400 V、50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: SKELEC / NEVLEC併網接入——230 / 400 V、50 Hz

summary.en: Saint Kitts and Nevis's electricity supply is operated by St Kitts Electricity Company (SKELEC) on Saint Kitts and Nevis Electricity Company (NEVLEC) on Nevis, with site-specific utility approval requirements. The island follows a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz utility system. Any grid-connected EV charger should be reviewed with SKELEC / NEVLEC for service capacity, metering, load management, protection coordination, earthing, commissioning, and tariff or interconnection treatment, especially for hotel, fleet, airport, port, or public-site installations. Renewable-energy policy interest in geothermal and solar generation may support pilot charging projects, but it does not remove utility approval obligations.
summary.zh: 圣基茨和尼维斯电力供应在圣基茨由SKELEC运营、在尼维斯由NEVLEC运营，并须按具体场站取得公用事业接入批准。该岛国采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz公用电力系统。任何并网电动汽车充电桩都应与SKELEC / NEVLEC确认供电容量、计量、负载管理、保护配合、接地、调试以及电价或互联处理，尤其是酒店、车队、机场、港口或公共场所安装。圣基茨和尼维斯对太阳能、储能和电网韧性有政策推动，可能支持充电桩试点项目，但不会免除公用事业审批义务。
summary.zht: 聖基茨和尼維斯電力供應在聖基茨由SKELEC運營、在尼維斯由NEVLEC運營，並須按具體場站取得公用事業接入批准。該島國採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz公用電力系統。任何併網電動汽車充電樁都應與SKELEC / NEVLEC確認供電容量、計量、負載管理、保護配合、接地、調試以及電價或互聯處理，尤其是酒店、車隊、機場、港口或公共場所安裝。聖基茨和尼維斯對太陽能、儲能和電網韌性有政策推動，可能支持充電樁試點項目，但不會免除公用事業審批義務。

standards_or_laws: SKELEC / NEVLEC utility connection and electrical service requirements
IEC 60038 — standard voltages, 230 / 400 V at 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic EV charger installations are designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 charging-system requirements, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 DC communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. Saint Kitts and Nevis has the same frequency but a different nominal voltage at 230 / 400 V, so input voltage range, protective-device ratings, metering, thermal design, and power-quality behavior must be confirmed for SKELEC / NEVLEC service conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电桩安装通常基于220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023充电系统要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通信以及当地电网运营商项目验收。圣基茨和尼维斯频率相同但标称电压不同，为230 / 400 V，因此须针对SKELEC / NEVLEC供电条件确认输入电压范围、保护器件额定值、计量、热设计和电能质量表现。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電樁安裝通常基於220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023充電系統要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通訊以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。聖基茨和尼維斯頻率相同但標稱電壓不同，為230 / 400 V，因此須針對SKELEC / NEVLEC供電條件確認輸入電壓範圍、保護器件額定值、計量、熱設計和電能質量表現。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must not treat 220 / 380 V China grid evidence as automatically Saint Kitts and Nevis-ready. Confirm 230 / 400 V input tolerance at 50 Hz, harmonic emissions, residual-current and overcurrent protection, metering, earthing, site load calculations, and SKELEC / NEVLEC connection documentation. For tourism sites and renewable-energy pilots, confirm whether solar, storage, or load-management controls are needed to avoid local feeder constraints.
gap.zh: 出口商不应将中国220 / 380 V电网证据视为自动适用于圣基茨和尼维斯。须确认50 Hz下230 / 400 V输入容差、谐波发射、剩余电流和过流保护、计量、接地、现场负荷计算以及SKELEC / NEVLEC接入文件。对于旅游场所和可再生能源试点，还应确认是否需要太阳能、储能或负载管理控制，以避免当地馈线容量限制。
gap.zht: 出口商不應將中國220 / 380 V電網證據視為自動適用於聖基茨和尼維斯。須確認50 Hz下230 / 400 V輸入容差、諧波發射、剩餘電流和過流保護、計量、接地、現場負荷計算以及SKELEC / NEVLEC接入文件。對於旅遊場所和可再生能源試點，還應確認是否需要太陽能、儲能或負載管理控制，以避免當地饋線容量限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — SKELEC / NEVLEC service approval and SKELEC / NEVLEC electricity-service requirements must be confirmed for the specific site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a SKELEC / NEVLEC approval substitute

source.publisher: St Kitts Electricity Company (SKELEC) and Nevis Electricity Company (NEVLEC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Saint Kitts and Nevis uses 230 / 400 V at 50 Hz, not China's 220 / 380 V baseline. A charger package needs SKELEC / NEVLEC site review, 230 / 400 V input confirmation, IEC 61000 power-quality evidence, and load-management planning where feeder capacity is limited.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圣基茨和尼维斯采用230 / 400 V、50 Hz，而非中国220 / 380 V基线。充电桩资料包须包括SKELEC / NEVLEC现场审查、230 / 400 V输入确认、IEC 61000电能质量证据，以及在馈线容量受限时的负载管理规划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聖基茨和尼維斯採用230 / 400 V、50 Hz，而非中國220 / 380 V基線。充電樁資料包須包括SKELEC / NEVLEC現場審查、230 / 400 V輸入確認、IEC 61000電能質量證據，以及在饋線容量受限時的負載管理規劃。
